{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114819AC946BA61A1F631D3065"}"},"total":19},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7608508425347711769","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后期弹幕画风转变太快了吧，文化断层这个设定和没有一样完全看不到，前文也没有文化复苏的过渡剧情，可以看到三十到四十章再决定要不要继续看[思考][思考][思考][思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771497936,"group_id":"7581406371480865816","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3052721309236110"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7581406371480865816","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7182,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7608497509090673433","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔，设定，都可以，剧情连贯，没有什么脑残发言，是国运类里为数不多的男主不装逼的，人设好，强力推荐[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771493437,"group_id":"7581406371480865816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ohlUCCvb/gBaGTQRigLtBBxZF24a8PQxA4s7QmByJ5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3052721309236110","user_name":"西凉山脉的赤松子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3052721309236110","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1652063299,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7581406371480865816","book_info":{"abstract":"苏林一觉醒来，发现自己穿越断层位面的华夏。
这个世界似乎出现了文明断层华夏的古代史几乎确实殆尽，
而天幕降世，每个国家自动选出一人参加国运比拼，并进行全球直播。
通过选择天幕提供的文明时代，进行国力实力对比，胜者则会增加国运，全民寿命上升，风调雨顺。
而败者则会扣除国土面积全民寿命下降，甚至于天降灾难。
而华夏，因为文化断层的原因，已经连败九场，全国民众苦不堪言。
就连只有看看几百年的鹰酱都能依靠革命时代过渡。
华夏瞬间沦为笑柄。
而最后一次机会，国运选中了苏林，开局苏林便摸到了一手好牌。
三个文明时代，分别是盛唐，五代十国，以及晚清。
苏林毫不犹豫选择盛唐，万国来朝天可汗亚州州长李世民，玄甲军所向披靡，丝绸之路通向全球，全球震惊。
而苏林也通过一场场比斗成功挽回华夏的国运。
大秦帝国，樱花老祖宗竟是秦人？
大汉帝国，上帝之鞭，居然是从东方被打跑过来的？
大明帝国：郑和七下西洋，永乐大帝五征漠北，永乐大典传遍世界。
到后边给的文明时代越来越离谱，甚至神话时代。
洪荒时代，开天时代，天庭时代，妖皇时代。
以及后面的个人实力盘点甚至于模拟沙盘出两人的虚影进行战斗。
秦锐士，魏武卒，乞活","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5ca0378fc0e61eb2b6bced027a8be320","author":"不识字的儒生","author_id":"","book_id":"7581406371480865816","book_name":"天幕盘点：让华夏再度伟大","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":500,"name":"断层","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500&name=断层&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600349629036642840","read_count":"14736","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"324620"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"115","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,开局,国运,断层","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6d02a4205e15b5face4f37f80e479cfd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162499&x-signature=IuLIbmiTSVzA0mLrqrSgaV6r9K8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3301186275650660","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114819AC946BA61A1F631D3065"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"r
